betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Terminal§f

§aThe basic interface to the ME network.§f

The §bME Terminal§f provides access to the ME network's item storage. Right-click to open the interface and view, insert, or extract items.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e1§f per terminal
§b•§f Functions: view, search, insert, extract items
§b•§f Right-click to open
§b•§f Works on all storage cells in the network

§6Features§f:
§b•§f §aSearch bar§f: filter items by name
§b•§f §aShift-click§f: move stacks quickly
§b•§f §aCraftable amount§f display: shows how many can be crafted
§b•§f §aItem type sorting§f: by name, mod, or quantity

§6Crafting Recipe§f:
§b•§f §b1× Glass Cable§f
§b•§f §b1× Illuminated Panel§f
§b•§f §b1× Logic Processor§f
§b•§f §b1× Formation Core§f
§b•§f §b1× Iron Ingot§f

§6Variants§f:
The ME Terminal has many specialized variants:
§b•§f §bME Crafting Terminal§f (3×3 grid)
§b•§f §bME Fluid Terminal§f
§b•§f §bME Pattern Terminal§f
§b•§f §bWireless Terminal§f
§b•§f §bConversion Monitor§f

§eTip§f: Place at least one §bME Terminal§f for every active player on the network. They are cheap and provide the §9primary user interface§f.
